nasb.text: So the sons of the singers were assembled from the district around Jerusalem, and from the villages of the Netophathites,

esv.text: And the sons of the singers gathered together from the district surrounding Jerusalem and from the villages of the Netophathites;

cnv.text: 歌唱者從耶路撒冷四圍的平原，從尼陀法的村莊，

ccb.text: 歌乐手的子孙从耶路撒冷周围地区，尼陀法的村庄，
